name: Misoshiru (Clear Soup with Soybean Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dashi in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Set a sieve over the pan.
3. Rub in the miso paste(s) of your choice (Aka, Shiro, or Awase).
4. Bring the soup to a simmer over moderate heat.
5. Remove from heat and add a pinch of MSG for flavor enhancement.
6. Garnish with Misoshiro No-mi before serving.
